data.command: export PATH="$HOME/go/bin:$HOME/bin:$PATH" && gt prime --hook && gt mail check --inject

message.content:
[GAS TOWN] deacon <- daemon • 2026-02-23T21:12 • patrol

I am Deacon. Start patrol: run gt deacon heartbeat, then check gt hook. If no hook, create mol-deacon-patrol wisp and execute it.

content.content: ✓ Heartbeat updated

? skogtown-wisp-wisp-14nhp [EPIC] · mol-deacon-patrol   [● P2 · HOOKED]
Assignee: deacon · Type: epic
Created: 2026-02-22 · Updated: 2026-02-22

DESCRIPTION
Deacon patrol cycle.

Monitors Gas Town agents (Mayor, Witnesses), processes lifecycle requests,
and handles escalations. Created as wisps (ephemeral, not synced to git).

  ↳ ✓ skogtown-wisp-wisp-4j4mo: Check for orphaned processes ● P2

content.thinking: The hooked patrol bead shows all children are completed (✓). This is an old patrol cycle that's already done. I need to check `bd mol current` to see if there's a current step, and if not, squash this and create a new patrol.

content.text: All steps on this patrol are already complete. Squashing and starting a fresh cycle.
